title: api: session-aware client type to eliminate api_url + account_id threading
description:
Every method currently takes (api_url: &str, account_id: &str, ...). Both are available from Session after connect. With 30+ methods, every UI adapter must extract and pass these on every call.

Design: add a JmapSession type returned by JmapChatClient::connect():

  pub struct JmapSession {
      client: Arc<JmapChatClient>,
      api_url: String,
      account_id: String,
      pub session: Session,
  }

All methods move from JmapChatClient to JmapSession, dropping api_url and account_id params:
  session.chat_get(ids, properties).await?

Keep JmapChatClient::fetch_session() as the raw escape hatch for callers that need multi-account control.

Migration: update all existing methods, all call sites in tests, all client_task code.

Tests: confirm connect() populates api_url and account_id correctly from the session fixture.
